description_long: This is a medium-sized ceramic vase with a wide, flared rim and a gently tapering body that widens again at the base. The upper section features a green band with a subtle, embossed leafy pattern, while the main body is adorned with a reddish-brown panel decorated with a large, stylized yellow floral motif. The lower and upper portions of the vase are a warm beige color, providing a soft contrast to the more vibrant central band. The surface appears matte with a slightly textured finish, suggesting it is hand-crafted or inspired by traditional pottery techniques. The interior is hollow, making it suitable for holding flowers or decorative items.
description: A beige ceramic vase with a green leafy band and a reddish-brown floral motif, featuring a flared rim and textured matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the prominent yellow floral motif on the reddish-brown band, with the green leafy band above and beige base and rim.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the back of the vase, where the floral motif is less visible and the reddish-brown band appears more uniform.
description_view_2: Similar to the front, this view also highlights the floral motif, but from a slightly different angle, showing more of the vase's curvature.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the reddish-brown band with only faint outlines of the floral motif, emphasizing the vase's symmetry and green band.
